name: Orca 2 (13B)
note: Reasoning-focused Llama-2 13B fine-tune trained with 'Prompt Erasure' to select its own reasoning strategy; rivals models 5-10x larger.

verificationNotes: Existence, Llama-2-13B backbone, Microsoft Research (non-commercial) License, and Nov 18 2023 HF card date all confirmed. Fetched arXiv 2311.11045 HTML directly and confirmed BBH 50.18, GSM8K 59.14, MMLU 57.73 verbatim (zero-shot). No discrepancies found.
